Daily Practice #3 - What is a Story?
Here is a list of movies that you may know or might want to watch. In each one,
identify the progratonist (or one of the many protagonists) and ask yourself:
How did this protagonist change over time?
Some will be easy. Others will be very tricky.
Movie 	Protagonist 	Beginning 	End
A Few Good Men 	Lt. Daniel Kaffee 	Doesn't value honor 	Values honor
A Few Good Men
When Harry Met Sally
Star Wars
Titanic
Avatar
The Shawshank Redemption
The Matrix
Toy Story
Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the
Lost Ark
The Wizard of Oz
Dirty Dancing
Back to the Future
Ferris Bueller’s Day Off
Hidden Figures
Courage Under Fire
